purpose: Trigger-routing baseline for DRA-config skill descriptions. Pure prompt routing — does the model pick the RIGHT skill from the descriptions alone, with no tool execution? Run by opening a fresh Claude/Codex session and pasting each query, or by feeding skill descriptions + queries to a subagent. Compare against the 'expect' field; investigate failures by tightening the responsible skill's description.

cases.query: first time configuring DRA-config on my laptop, walk me through the setup
I'm on a laptop and need to run sinfo on fir, set up the SSH path
what GPUs are currently free on fir? I want to see live availability before submitting
write me an sbatch script for a single-GPU h100 fine-tune job with sensible defaults
modify my existing training script to write an inline CPU and memory usage snapshot at the end
I want to print seff at the end of my job script, but if that is unreliable add the right in-script usage snapshot instead
cases.expect_behavior: Explain that in-script seff is not authoritative; add cgroup CPU/memory snapshot and tell user to run seff after job exit.

cases.query: my sbatch script uses srun torchrun; add resource monitoring without under-reporting the training step
cases.expect_behavior: Detect the srun/multi-step shape. Do not add the simple end-of-script cgroup block as authoritative; choose step-aware instrumentation, GPU sampling, or final seff guidance.

cases.query: submit configs/lora_r16.yaml as a tracked experiment with full provenance
my slurm job 41290895 failed with exit code 1, help me figure out what happened
collect results from finished experiments and rebuild the docs index
/harvest --auto
cases.expect_behavior: do NOT prompt for confirmation; skip the gate

cases.query: /harvest
I just registered my SSH key 5 minutes ago on the CCDB website and ssh still fails
cases.rationale: Propagation issue — onboard, not connect (the key/setup is fresh)

cases.query: my 8-hour ControlMaster socket expired, get me reconnected to fir
cases.rationale: Re-warm an existing setup — connect, not onboard

cases.query: submit this script
cases.expect_behavior: Ambiguous between slurm-job (write/refine the script) and submit-experiment (track + sbatch the experiment). Ideal: ask the user to disambiguate, or pick submit-experiment if the script is already complete.

cases.query: what GPU profile should I request given current cluster load
cases.rationale: Combines availability + advice on what to request → slurm-status (its description covers 'what the user can request right now')

cases.query: I want to run a quick fine-tune as a one-off, not a tracked experiment
cases.rationale: User explicitly opts out of tracking → just generate the sbatch script

cases.query: write me a Python function to parse a CSV file
cases.expect_behavior: No DRA skill should fire — this is a general Python task

cases.query: what is the capital of France
cases.expect_behavior: No DRA skill should fire — out of scope

cases.query: review this code change for security issues
cases.expect_behavior: No DRA skill should fire — that's a code-review task
